_comment: Overlay applied with `tauri build --config tauri.macos.json` when building the C++-backend flavor on macOS arm64. The `macOS.frameworks` list places each dylib under `.app/Contents/Frameworks/` so the `@loader_path/../Frameworks` rpath baked into the binary can resolve them. Ad-hoc codesigning (from the base tauri.conf.json `signingIdentity: '-'`) re-signs the copied dylibs.
